creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback



> pkg_delete: package 'opera-12.02' is required by these other packages 
> and may not be deinstalled (but I'll delete it anyway): 
> opera-linuxplugins-12.02 

This happes is you don't deistall the ports that have this port 
as a dependency, e.g. opera-linuxplugins-12.02 

running "pkg_delete -f" will have side-effects, 
as you reported.
